name: Optimistic list add
problem: Adding an item to a list feels slow when the UI waits for the server before showing it.
accessibility_requirements: announce the added item via aria-live
move focus to the new item or its input
clearly indicate and recover from a failed add
performance_budget: 60fps; insert animation under one frame budget
success_criteria: the new item appears immediately on submit
a failed add is rolled back with a clear, recoverable error
